prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约4330→4527→2949→1669→1521，2023年起位次大幅前移（数字减小），近3年累计前移约3000名；2025年基准约1521名；本省物理类计划2021年105人→2022年95人→2023年43人→2024年33人→2025年30人，持续缩招；2026年计划28人，较2025年再缩招约6.7%，缩招趋势延续，竞争进一步加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜2026年第12名（2021年第11→2022年第13→2023年第13→2024年第16→2025年第14→2026年第12），排名稳居全国Top15，属顶尖工科院校；2024年声誉中性/混合，考生曾反映投档线波动但实际位次持续前移；2026年声誉中性/混合，无明显负面冲击；抖音热度总排名第10（高热），短视频曝光量大，反映报考关注度持续升温；第五轮学科评估A-及以上共17个学科，其中A+有力学、机械工程、材料科学与工程、环境科学与工程；A有计算机科学与技术、控制科学与工程、土木工程等；工科实力全国顶尖，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等哈工大王牌专业方向社会热度持续高热（2026年专业热度分析显示计算机类、电子信息/通信均为高热推荐）；本省物理类考生2021年约16.6万→2025年约26.1万→2026年估算约38万（总考生52.1万×73%），考生规模大幅增长，竞争加剧；哈工大位于黑龙江，属东北地区，对江苏考生存在一定地域距离；但作为C9顶尖工科院校，跨省吸引力强，近年位次持续前移表明地域因素未构成明显阻力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026年计划继续缩招约6.7%、本省物理类考生大幅增加约46%、学校声誉稳定且抖音高热，在2025年基准1521名基础上，供需弹性模型显示位次进一步前移至约1521名；预测最低位次约1460名，区间1294–1626名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 4330 → 4527 → 2949 → 1669 → 1521. Since 2023, the ranking has significantly moved forward (numbers decreasing), with a cumulative forward shift of about 3000 places in the last three years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 1521. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 105 in 2021 → 95 in 2022 → 43 in 2023 → 33 in 2024 → 30 in 2025, showing continuous contraction. The 2026 plan is 28, a further reduction of about 6.7% compared to 2025. The contraction trend continues, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 12th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking (11th in 2021 → 13th in 2022 → 13th in 2023 → 16th in 2024 → 14th in 2025 → 12th in 2026), consistently in the national Top 15, a top-tier engineering institution. In 2024, reputation was neutral/mixed; candidates reported fluctuations in admission cutoffs but actual rankings continued to move forward. In 2026, reputation remains neutral/mixed with no significant negative impact. Douyin heat ranking is 10th overall (high heat), with large short video exposure, reflecting continuously rising attention from applicants. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 17 disciplines rated A- or above, including A+ in Mechanics, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, and Environmental Science and Engineering; A in Computer Science and Technology, Control Science and Engineering, Civil Engineering, etc. Its engineering strength is top in the country, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and other flagship majors of HIT continue to be highly popular in society (2026 major popularity analysis shows Computer Science and Electronic Information/Communication are both high-heat recommendations). The number of Physics Category candidates in the province was approximately 166,000 in 2021 → 261,000 in 2025 → estimated 380,000 in 2026 (total candidates 521,000 × 73%), showing a significant increase in candidate scale, intensifying competition. HIT is located in Heilongjiang, in the Northeast region, which presents a certain geographical distance for Jiangsu candidates. However, as a top C9 engineering institution, its cross-provincial appeal is strong, and the continuous forward shift in rankings in recent years indicates that geographical factors have not posed a significant obstacle.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend in historical rankings, the further contraction of the 2026 enrollment plan by about 6.7%, the significant increase in provincial Physics Category candidates by about 46%, the stable school reputation, and high Douyin heat, based on the 2025 baseline of 1521, the supply-demand elasticity model shows the ranking will further move forward to approximately 1521. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1460, with a range of 1294–1626.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Top Class, HKU Excellence Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Academician Special Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Technology Top Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (AI Plus Advanced Technology Leading Class)
- Artificial Intelligence (Zhongguancun Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (AI Academician Special Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Brain-Machine Intelligence)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Autonomous Intelligence)
- Embodied Intelligence (Greater Bay Area Class) (Shenzhen Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1294–1626, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main direction, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (within 1294), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors (Top Class, Academician Special Class). If your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 1626), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 safety majors, while also considering Tier 2.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 2229 → 1601 → 1489, continuously moving forward (decreasing numbers), with a cumulative forward movement of about 740 places in the past 2 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 1489; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 16 in 2023 → 22 in 2024 → 10 in 2025 → 10 in 2026, with 2026 unchanged from 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 12th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, a top-tier institution; reputation in 2026 is neutral/mixed, with no significant negative impact; Douyin popularity ranks 10th overall (high heat), reflecting high overall attention; HIT is strong in engineering, but for History Category it only offers one major: Economics and Management Pilot Class (Intelligent Social Governance), corresponding to Management Science and Engineering (A), Business Administration (not individually rated), etc.; liberal arts-related discipline evaluation data is limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: The Economics and Management Pilot Class corresponds to the broad categories of Finance/Economics/Economy, with 2026 major popularity differentiation and average heat; the number of History Category examinees in the province was approximately 95,000 in 2021 → 97,000 in 2025 → estimated 141,000 in 2026 (total examinees 521,000 × 27%), with an increase of about 45%, intensifying competition; HIT is located in Heilongjiang, which is geographically distant for Jiangsu liberal arts examinees, and the university's liberal arts majors are singular, making its appeal relatively limited.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend in historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan in 2026, the significant increase of about 45% in provincial History Category examinees, but the singular liberal arts major and average popularity, based on the 2025 baseline of 1489, the supply-demand elasticity model shows the ranking will move slightly forward (competition slightly eases) to approximately 1489; the predicted minimum ranking is about 1474, with a range of 1304–1644.

Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 1304–1644 can attempt to apply; those with rankings better than the lower limit of the range (within 1319) have a higher probability of admission; those with rankings near the upper limit of the range (around 1659) can consider it as a reach.
